nodes.speaker: Donny
nodes.text:
GUYS! Boys' night!
Let's Taco-Bongo our feelings!

nodes.speaker: Donny
nodes.text:
Now THAT'S what I'm talking
about! Extra guac on me!

nodes.speaker: Donny
nodes.text:
The case can wait ONE hour.
C'mon. Deep-fried oreos too.

nodes.speaker: Donny
nodes.text: Your loss. More oreos for me.
